basics.name: Stephanie Castelblanco
basics.label: Student
basics.summary: Recent University of Hawaii at Manoa graduate with a B.S. in Computer and Security Sciences and CompTIA Security+ certification (SY0-701). Passionate about cybersecurity with hands-on experience in network defense, threat analysis, vulnerability scanning, and system hardening using tools like Wireshark and Nmap. Currently pursuing HTB Certified Junior Cybersecurity Associate (HTB CJCA). Seeking entry-level opportunities in SOC monitoring, incident triage, or governance/risk/compliance. Bilingual in English and Spanish

courses: Software Engineering I, CSCI Discrete Mathematics I, Disc Math for Comp Sci II, Program Structure, CSCI Intro to Computer Science I

highlights: Ensure seamless server performance and guest satisfaction

awards.title: Dean's List
awards.summary: The Dean’s List recognizes students who maintain outstanding academic records at Leeward Community College.
